meaning: n.威斯康星州(美国州名),威斯康星河(密西西比河支流)
examples: I sold my car on eBay to a man in Wisconsin.
The company teamed up with Wisconsin-based rancher Northstar Bison.
"You can't say keg party at Arizona State is much better than bar crawl at the University of Wisconsin," he explained.
Nouri studied at the University of Wisconsin and still refers to himself as a Badger.
Cirrus made its start in the 1980s, designing kit airplanes out of a farmhouse in Wisconsin.
